title: dactylorhiza cruenta subsp. salina
intro: Dactylorhiza cruenta subsp. salina, also known as the Saline-spotted Orchid, is a subspecies of orchid native to the coastal regions of Europe and North Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Dactylorhiza cruenta subsp. salina include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, although further research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of its medicinal uses.
